Expert-level proficiency in React and Next.js, including server components, the App Router, and advanced patterns like compound components, render props, and custom hooks. I have built production applications serving millions of users with these technologies.

My experience includes complex state management with Zustand and Jotai, data fetching with React Query and Apollo Client, and performance optimization through code splitting, memoization, and virtualized lists.

Strong backend development skills with Node.js, Express, Fastify, and tRPC. Experienced in designing RESTful and GraphQL APIs, implementing authentication and authorization, and building real-time applications with WebSockets.

I also have working knowledge of Deno and Bun for modern server-side JavaScript runtimes.
